text.title: lang-ruby-sorbet-strict-floor Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lang-ruby-sorbet-strict-floor as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent appends T.unsafe(self).method_name(...) to bypass a Sorbet error instead of fixing the type or generating the missing RBI.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: T.unsafe blackholes type information past that point, defeating the gate; legitimate uses are rare and require human review with a comment.

failure-mode.description: Edit a hand-written shim under sorbet/rbi/shims/ to silence a Sorbet error instead of regenerating the DSL RBI.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hand-written shims lie about the real shape; tapioca check-shims flags them, but if CI is missing the check, drift compounds silently.
